summary: Frontend testing of Add Product form category-specific interfaces complete. All 12 features tested and PASSED. Wire category shows Wire Configuration section with AC/DC and 4sqmm/6sqmm toggles, auto-calculated prices match requirements. Service category shows Service Configuration with dropdown (4 options) and base price ₹1500. Both categories auto-generate product names and hide Brand field. Wire hides Price field (auto-calculated).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Add Product form now has category-specific interfaces. Wire category shows Wire Configuration section with AC/DC type and 4sqmm/6sqmm size toggles with auto-calculated prices. Service category shows Service Configuration with dropdown for 4 service types and base price ₹1500. Both auto-generate product names. Brand hidden for Wire/Service, Price hidden for Wire.

category_buttons_clickable.details: All 6 categories (Solar Panels, Inverters, Batteries, Solar Wire, Accessories, Services) displayed as clickable buttons with icons

wire_configuration_section.details: Wire Configuration section with blue styling visible when Solar Wire category selected

wire_type_toggle_ac_dc.details: AC Wire and DC Wire toggle buttons present and functional

wire_size_toggle_4sqmm_6sqmm.details: 4 sqmm and 6 sqmm toggle buttons present and functional

wire_auto_price_calculation.details: All prices correct: AC 4sqmm=₹35, AC 6sqmm=₹55, DC 4sqmm=₹45, DC 6sqmm=₹65 per meter

wire_auto_name_generation.details: Names auto-generated: 'AC Wire 4sqmm (per meter)', 'DC Wire 6sqmm (per meter)', etc.

service_configuration_section.details: Service Configuration section with green styling visible when Services category selected

service_type_dropdown_4_options.details: Dropdown with 4 options: Installation Service, Maintenance Service, Repair Service, Consultation Service

service_base_price_1500.details: Base Price: ₹1500 displayed prominently in Service Configuration section

service_auto_name_generation.details: Names auto-generated based on service type: 'Solar Installation Service', 'Solar Maintenance Service', 'Solar Repair Service', 'Solar Consultation Service'

brand_field_hidden_wire_service.details: Brand input field not visible when Wire or Service category is selected

price_field_hidden_wire.details: Price input field not visible when Wire category selected (auto-calculated from toggle selections)

ui_tests_performed: Verified all 6 category buttons are clickable
Selected Solar Wire category - Wire Configuration section appeared
Tested AC Wire / DC Wire toggle buttons
Verified all 4 wire price combinations (AC 4sqmm=₹35, AC 6sqmm=₹55, DC 4sqmm=₹45, DC 6sqmm=₹65)
Verified Brand and Price fields hidden for Wire
Selected Services category - Service Configuration section appeared
Verified Service Type dropdown has 4 options
Tested service type changes (Installation, Maintenance, Repair)
Verified service auto-generates product name based on type
Verified Brand field hidden for Service
